[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000000100 2
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0100101001 4
7 1000100000 2
